title: Security Control Tests: CI validation for new hardening measures

tasks.description: Add CI test verifying .git is read-only inside tools container (docker compose exec git status should fail to write)
Add CI test verifying private/ and config/secrets/ are empty/inaccessible inside container
Add hook selftest for fail-closed behavior in block-direct-git-ops.py error paths
Add selftest for filelock-based metadata.json locking (concurrent write detection)
Integrate new security tests into cargo make ci pipeline

summary: Regression tests and CI validation for all hardening measures from the other 5 tracks.
Ensure security controls cannot silently degrade without CI detection.
This track should be implemented last, after the other 5 tracks complete.

sections.title: Container Security Tests
description: Verify .git read-only mount and sensitive directory exclusion are enforced.

sections.title: Hook Behavior Tests
description: Verify fail-closed error handling in security-critical hooks.

sections.title: Concurrency Tests
description: Verify file locking prevents metadata.json corruption under concurrent access.

sections.title: CI Integration
description: Wire all new tests into the cargo make ci pipeline.
